zh.Scole, Depwade, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯可爾
zh.Stradbroke, Hartismere, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Shelton於1256年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯可爾時，他的父親Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight46歲，母親Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton43歲。他於1282年之前與Mrs John de Shelton在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1303年11月18日之後在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可。

zh-hans.Scole, Depwade, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可斯可爾
zh-hans.Stradbroke, Hartismere, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Shelton于1256年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可斯可爾时，他的父亲Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight46岁，母亲Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton43岁。他于1282年之前与Mrs John de Shelton在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1303年11月18日之后在英国英格兰素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可。

nameMeanings.name: Shelton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name primarily from Shelton (Nottinghamshire), but also from Shelton (Bedfordshire, Norfolk, Shropshire, and Staffordshire). The placenames all derive from Old English scelf ‘rock, ledge, shelf’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Shelton was born in 1256, in Scole, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight, was 46 and his mother, Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton, was 43. He married Mrs John de Shelton before 1282, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died after 18 November 1303, in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Shelton est né en 1256, à Scole, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Mrs John de Shelton avant 1282, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 18 novembre 1303, à Stradbroke, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Shelton 1256 in Scole, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight 46 und seine Mutter Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton 43. Er hat vor 1282 in England Mrs John de Shelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 18. November 1303 in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Shelton è nato il nel 1256 nel Scole, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Mrs John de Shelton prima del 1282, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 18 novembre 1303, nel Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Loddon, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクロッドオン

ja.Scole, Depwade, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクスコール
ja.Stradbroke, Hartismere, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクストラドブロク
ja.lifeSummary: John Sheltonが1256年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクスコールで生まれた時，父Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knightは46歳，母Lady Isabell Westwick de Sheltonは43歳であった。1282年以前にイギリスでMrs John de Sheltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1303年11月18日以後にイギリスイギリススフォルクストラドブロクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Shelton(이)가 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 스콜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1282년 이전 영국에서 Mrs John de Shelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1303년 11월 18일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라드브로크에서 사망했다.

mn.Scole, Depwade, Norfolk, England: Scole, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Shelton nasceu em 1256, em Scole, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs John de Shelton antes 1282, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 18 de novembro de 1303, em Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Shelton родился в 1256 г. в местности скол, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs John de Shelton перед 1282 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер после 18 ноябрь 1303 г. в местности страдброк, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Shelton nació en 1256, en Scole, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry De Shelton 7th Lord of Shelton, Knight, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Lady Isabell Westwick de Shelton, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Mrs John de Shelton antes de 1282, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió después de 18 de noviembre de 1303, en Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
